title: folk-siblings envelope (v0.2)
description: typed json envelope for inter-agent letters. a2a-compatible shape. v0.2 renames from/to to sender/recipient, adds correlation_id, idempotency_key, trace_id, sent_at. adds 'proposal' as 8th kind.

protocol_version.description: the envelope version this letter claims to conform to, e.g. '0.2' or '0.2-draft'

correlation_id.description: exchange-level id. all letters in one back-and-forth share this value. used for loop guard (replied_correlations) and thread view.

idempotency_key.description: stable key for dedupe. usually equal to message_id. allows safe replay.

trace_id.description: ordered list of message_ids traversed so far in this exchange. used for loop detection. cap in the checker, not here.

kind.description: message kind. see protocol/kinds.md. 'proposal' is a bilateral change request that should not ship until the other agent ratifies.

in_reply_to.description: message_id of the letter this is replying to, or null

thread.description: optional thread id for grouping related letters. prefer correlation_id.

body.description: the actual message content, markdown allowed

refs.description: optional pointers to external artifacts (urls, file paths, commit shas)

expects_reply.description: if true, the sender expects an ack or substantive reply. silence is a valid response when false.

response_mode.description: optional hint for how the recipient should respond

sent_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp the letter was written. replaces v0.1 'ts'.
